title: Panoramic Sea-View Estate on Koh Samui
blurb: A six-bedroom estate conceived as one of Koh Samui's finest private havens — pavilion bedrooms with unobstructed sea and island views, a 25-metre infinity pool, and a resort's worth of amenities from private cinema and tennis court to a Muay Thai ring.
detail:
Welcome to a crown jewel of luxury living on Koh Samui — a stunning six-bedroom estate that stands as one of the island's finest private havens, perched for unobstructed views of the sea. You enter across stepping stones over a serene koi pond, with tall Buddha statues set into a stone-clad wall, setting the tone for the opulence that follows. At the heart of the residence, a two-storey pavilion houses a vast glass-walled lounge and dining room on the upper level, where contemporary artwork and a cascading glass chandelier meet seascapes and lush tropical forest on every side.

The three master bedrooms each occupy standalone pavilions, positioned for dramatic sea and island views from their king-size beds, with glass-walled rain showers, private rooftop gardens, terrazzo bathtubs and terraces — and one suite enjoys its own private 12-metre pool. Doors slide open onto wide terraces above the garden and the enticing 25-metre infinity pool, which blends seamlessly into the horizon.

Far more than a retreat, the estate is an entertainment haven: a private cinema with ten recliners, a games room with pool table, a children's club and playroom, a fully equipped gym, sauna and dedicated spa room, plus a private tennis court and a Muay Thai boxing ring. With a full team of dedicated staff and private chef on hand, it is a singular setting for celebrations and gatherings — the pinnacle of luxury living on Koh Samui.

features.l: One suite with private 12 m pool
Private tennis court & Muay Thai ring
